body_txt: Many unpleasant diseases have mellifluous Greek and Latin names that might make nice names for people if not for the associations. Such associations aren't so unwelcome in broad burlesques, which is where these names are most likely to be Played for Laughs . Not to be confused with Typhoid Mary , a character named after a disease they genuinely carry. A Poisonous Person or Plaguemaster may also have a malady-based name suggesting they are the Anthropomorphic Personification of a disease. But this trope is about otherwise healthy people with Names to Run Away from Really Fast . And diseases named after people don't count. A Sub-Trope of Scientific and Technological Theme Naming as its pathological branch, a common source of Parody Names , and target of Who Names Their Kid "Dude"? . Not to be confused with The Disease That Shall Not Be Named . Index Syndrome is an index of trope names that sound like diseases. Overlaps with Unfortunate Names if the Diseased Name incurs a negative reaction.
